item.name: Pinky Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your Pinky will magically bring the elephantine machine trumpeting to life.

mount.name: Pinky
mount.action: Summon forth Pinky, an elephantine machine engineered to enrapture.
mount.description: Upon hearing that inebriated folk are wont to have visions of a delightful pink elephant, the Loporrits were inspired to make the creature a reality. The tale was, of course, simply a joke at their expense, but if this machine brings a smile to even one person, then their efforts will not have been in vain.
mount.tooltip:
This pink color is perfect!
- Auri Boy
